summary: Complete E2E testing of P0 latency optimizations. All features verified working: SSE streaming with warmup (10 msgs) and steady (100 msgs) profiles, global SQS client singleton, 10 concurrent polls, adaptive WaitTimeSeconds, per-batch send timestamps, send/receive overlap for burst mode, and Optimization Journey before/after comparison card. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 8 tabs render correctly, test controls functional, Optimization Journey card displays with -99% improvement comparison.

minor.issue: AWS ResourceConflictException when trying to set Provisioned Concurrency - SnapStart enabled functions don't support PC. Non-blocking, just logs errors.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after brief delay

passed_tests: GET /api/test/stream?profile=warmup returns valid SSE events: status, send_progress, result_batch, stats, complete
GET /api/test/stream?profile=steady works for 100 messages - received 100/100 with avg 828ms latency
POST /api/warmup returns success=true with message 'Lambda warmed up successfully'
GET /api/test-history returns array with 50+ test runs
Frontend 'Live Testing' tab renders test controls (profile selector, warmup button, run test button)
Frontend renders 'Optimization Journey' comparison card (data-testid='optimization-journey') showing Original→Concurrency→Throughput→Current Run
Frontend renders latency breakdown visualization (data-testid='latency-stacked-bar') with 6 service segments
Frontend renders bottleneck analysis (data-testid='bottleneck-analysis') with primary bottleneck, concurrency used, throughput
Frontend test history panel toggles open/close (data-testid='toggle-history-btn')
All 8 navigation tabs render correctly (Home, Live Testing, Architecture, Optimizations, Terraform, Course, About Matt, Bulava)
SSE endpoint returns correct content-type: text/event-stream
SSE status event contains phase, message, total fields
SSE complete event contains sent, received, throughput, latencies fields
SSE stats event contains stats, distribution, latency_breakdown, bottleneck_analysis
GET /api/ returns Hello World
POST /api/heartbeat returns provisioned_concurrency and status
GET /api/pc-status returns current_pc and status
POST /api/bulava/augment returns augmentation with text, tier, type
GET /api/bulava/categories returns ad_categories and augmentation_types
GET /api/bulava/analytics returns total_augmentations, by_category, by_type

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All P0 features verified: SSE streaming, Optimization Journey card, latency breakdown, bottleneck analysis, test history)

seed_data_creation: Multiple test runs created during testing - 50+ history entries in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 latency optimizations fully implemented and working. Key features: (1) Global SQS client singleton with TCP keepalive and 100 connection pool at line ~278 in server.py, (2) 10 concurrent polls with adaptive WaitTimeSeconds (0 when flowing, 1 when dry) at line ~735, (3) Per-batch send timestamps for burst mode at line ~666, (4) Pre-polling overlap during burst sends at line ~680-745. Frontend Optimization Journey card (data-testid='optimization-journey') shows Original (11,026ms) → +Concurrency (2,896ms) → +Throughput (987ms) → Current Run comparison. Latest warmup test showed 100ms avg latency with -99% improvement from baseline.

sse_streaming_warmup.details: 10 messages sent/received with proper SSE events (status, send_progress, result_batch, stats, complete)

sse_streaming_steady.details: 100 messages sent/received with avg 828ms latency, 59.7 msgs/sec throughput

optimization_journey_card.details: Card displays Original (11,026ms) → +Concurrency (2,896ms, -74%) → +Throughput (987ms, -91%) → Current Run with -99% improvement

latency_breakdown.details: Stacked bar shows 6 segments: SQS Accept, Queue Wait, Lambda Trigger, Compute, I/O, Delivery

bottleneck_analysis.details: Shows primary bottleneck (Lambda I/O), concurrency used (50), throughput (55.8/s), recommendations

test_history_toggle.details: Toggle button expands/collapses history panel with 50+ runs, filter by profile works

navigation_tabs.details: All 8 tabs (Home, Live Testing, Architecture, Optimizations, Terraform, Course, About Matt, Bulava) render correctly
